title: Waterlogged Scriptorium
description:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a [aqua]withered figure[/aqua] working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are [sine]stuffed[/sine] full of damp scrolls and parchment.

Noticing a patron has entered, the [aqua]scribe-shopkeeper[/aqua] snaps to attention and gestures at some [gold]implements[/gold] arranged on a desk.
conditions: All players must have at least 65 Gold
notes: Both Tentacle Quill and Prickly Sponge offer the [purple]Steady[/purple] enchantment, which stabilizes card effects. Prickly Sponge allows enchanting 2 cards but requires 155 Gold, while Tentacle Quill enchants only 1 card for 65 Gold. The post-event pages describe the scribe's reactions to your choice, with each option revealing different aspects of the shop's wares.
